title: HaWare Colander Stainless Steel, 5-Quart Large Colanders with Handle & Base, Metal Micro-Perforated Strainer for Kitchen Pasta/Vegetable/Rice/Fruit/Food - Dishwasher Safe(28cm)
features: 【DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL】 HaWare kitchen strainer is made of 100% high quality stainless steel and built to last a lifetime. NO corrode, bend or warp for years. NO BPA , NOT worry it will leach plastic chemicals into your food, eco-friendly, good placement for plastic colander

【5-QUART LARGE SIZE】 About 28cm diameter wide and 10cm deep bowl, meet all your cooking, straining and kitchen preparation needs. It’s great for all types of food both hot and cold, Perfect for washing, rinsing or draining noddles, rice, fruit, vegetables, berries, beans, spaghetti, even for small restaurants and food trucks

【TWO HANDLES & FOOTED DESIGN】Two handles for good grip and preventing heating (especially for draining hot food, like pasta. Good to hang on kitchen hook rack, bring you convenient cooking and tidy kitchen. 1 cm height Footed design for keeping food lifted to prevent back flow and tipping over and keep the food from touching the table

【DISHWASHER SAFE - LESS CLEANING TIME】The Stainless Steel Strainer is dishwasher safe and rust-proof. These colanders ensure times saving convenience when it comes to cleaning, Brightly comes out as new. That's good news for your busy cooking.
description: Product Description Colander Is A Must-have Set For Everyone Colander is a must-have set for everyone. It is an indispensable kitchen tool for draining water after washing your fruits and veggies. A colander may also be used to stop grease splatters or steam veggies. This tool truly plays an important role as it can help you in a variety of ways in the kitchen.Aware our customers’ needs, we know how inconvenience to work with ineffective or unreliable kitchen tools. And we understand how a happy life to cook with a easier and more convenient tools. HaWare kitchen tool will be your happy choice. Why Choose HaWare Stainless Steel ？ Light Weight The colander is large and sturdy, but the weight is not too heavy, good weight to hold in hands Large DIameter Not too deep but can still hold lot of food due to the large diameter. Even if the whole pot of pasta is poured in Easy Clean By Dishwasher It can also be put into the dishwasher, and it will turn bright and sparkling after it is finished. More details need your attention Fast Draining Small & Closely Holes Covered Whole Surface Awesome product features closely spaced, micro perforated holes to ensure quick and effective draining.So whether you’re draining pastas, vegetable, meat, or etc., you don’t need to tilt it to drain the remaining water. You can be sure there won’t be a puddle at its bottom. Stable Base Footed Designed Base Keeps the Food From Touching the Table Designed a sturdy and stable wire-raise base that will offer you the stability you need while using it. You don’t have to worry about this strainer tipping over even when it’s full. With it’s stainless steel and simple design, it can even be used as a display bowl for your countertop for fresh fruit and other items. Twin Handles Easy Grip Handles As Great As Hanging Hooks Each one with twin handles provided a strong grip ,so it can distribute carrying evenly and provide great assistance while shaking the water or liquid out. Besides, a great choice to hang on kitchen hood for space saving Frequently Asked Questions Q & A from Customer： 1. Can I drain quinoa? The hole is 1mm - 2mm, could be used for ordinary quinoa. 2. Are these any good for washing raw rice? Not 100% ensure that no raw rice leaking out, but it could be good use for washing raw rice indeed. 3. Could it be dishwasher-safe? These colanders ensure timesaving convenience when it comes to cleaning, It’s also safe to be put in the dishwasher.
